refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall provide detailed worksite area analysis including terrain mapping, obstacle identification, and work-zone representation to support planning and execution.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed to explicitly identify key aspects of worksite mapping that are critical for operational effectiveness and safety: terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by generating a worksite model/map that includes terrain features, obstacle locations, and delineated work zones, validated against ground truth data or site surveys.
sub_frs: FR1: Analyze and map terrain features of the worksite.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Define and represent work-zone boundaries and areas.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle mapping.
DP2: Employ GIS-based digital mapping for work-zone representation.
DP3: Integrate sensor data with real-time processing algorithms for dynamic updates.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle mapping.

potential_sources: Sensor data processing tightly coupled with mapping algorithms.
Work-zone representation depends on terrain and obstacle data.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically supports the FRs with manageable coupling; sensor fusion enables accurate terrain and obstacle mapping, which is foundational for work-zone representation.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of LIDAR and camera sensors in all worksite conditions.
Risk of sensor data inaccuracies affecting map quality.
High safety criticality requires robust error handling and validation.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding DP for GIS-based work-zone representation to fully cover FR3 in next decomposition level.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for integrating sensor data, processing, and generating the worksite model/map.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data (LIDAR, camera) from Vehicle module.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite model/map data to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules for planning and execution.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with Safety Services and Teleoperation modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the module integrates sensor fusion and mapping; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle provides raw data but does not process mapping; moderate diffusion risk if mapping logic is duplicated.
Teleoperation consumes map data but should not implement mapping logic; risk if mapping duplicated here.
Safety Services uses map data for alerts but should not contain mapping logic; high diffusion risk if duplicated.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports clear ownership and safety criticality.
containment_risks: Potential for mapping logic duplication in Vehicle or Teleoperation modules if interfaces are not strictly enforced.
High safety criticality demands rigorous interface control and validation.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Enforce strict interface contracts and module boundaries to prevent diffusion; consider modularizing mapping sub-functions within NGHE Solution.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle mapping) adequately satisfies the refined FRs with clear logical mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Risk of mapping logic duplication in Vehicle or Teleoperation modules if interfaces are not enforced.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: NGHE Solution module shows high containment score and low diffusion risk, supporting good architectural packaging.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the NGHE Solution module's ability to generate accurate worksite maps from sensor data.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of mapping functionality to NGHE Solution module with defined interfaces to Vehicle and Teleoperation.

recommended_revisions: Add GIS-based work-zone representation DP in next level to fully cover FR3.
Strengthen interface enforcement to avoid diffusion risks.
Consider sub-module decomposition within NGHE Solution for maintainability.

decision.justification: The current level decomposition is sound but FR3 (work-zone representation) requires further refinement and DP elaboration; architectural packaging is appropriate but needs interface enforcement.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Analyze and map terrain features of the worksite.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Define and represent work-zone boundaries and areas.

revise.why: To elaborate work-zone representation and select corresponding DP(s) to fully satisfy all sub-FRs.
